case_title: XIAO DONG ZHAO VS. SANDALWOOD INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHAO, XIAO DONG AS TO DEFENDANT SANDALWOOD INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHAO, XIAO DONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDALWOOD INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $7,499.43 PRINCIPAL, $331.18 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,035.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
